globalError.title: Our servers are taking a quick break.
globalError.description: We will be back up shortly! Error Code: {errorMessage}

failedToFetchError.title: Oops!
failedToFetchError.description: Request timed out or network error. Please try again later.

10701013.description: Oops, the item is unavailable now.

10701014.description: Oops, the item is unavailable now.

10701015.description: Oops, the item is unavailable now.

10701038.description: Oops, the item is unavailable now.

10701017.title: Item is out of stock
10701017.description: Oops, The item is out of stock, please refresh the product page.

10701001.title: Hit purchase limit
10701001.description: Oops, the item has a purchase limit.

10701004.title: Same swatch cannot be added repeatedly
10701004.description: Oops, the same swatch cannot be added repeatedly.

10701034.title: Hit cart limit
10701034.description: Oops, the number of items in your cart has reached the limit.

10701040.title: Failed to merge carts
10701040.description: Oops, items added to the cart while logged out cannot merge into your logged-in cart, possibly due to exceeding purchase limits or invalid items.

10702029.title: Confirm Your Selection
10702029.description: Customized items in your order are made specifically for you and cannot be returned, exchanged, or refunded.

10702031.title: Confirm Your Selection
10702031.description: Customized items in your order are made specifically for you and cannot be returned, exchanged, or refunded.

10702000.title: Item is deleted
10702000.description: Oops, one of your picks is no longer available. We’ve updated your cart and will refresh the page shortly.

10702010.title: Item is deleted
10702010.description: Oops, some of your picks are no longer available. We’ve updated your cart and will refresh the page shortly.

10702001.title: Item is unavailable
10702001.description: Oops, one of your picks is no longer available. We’ve updated your cart and will refresh the page shortly.

10702012.title: Item is unavailable
10702012.description: Oops, some of your picks are no longer available. We’ve updated your cart and will refresh the page shortly.

10702002.title: Item is disabled
10702002.description: Oops, one of your picks is no longer available. We’ve updated your cart and will refresh the page shortly.

10702011.title: Item is disabled
10702011.description: Oops, some of your picks are no longer available. We’ve updated your cart and will refresh the page shortly.

10702003.title: Item price is outdated
10702003.description: The price of this item has changed. Please refresh your cart to continue with checkout.

10702013.title: Item price is outdated
10702013.description: The prices of some items have changed. Please refresh your cart to continue with checkout.

10702019.title: Exceeding purchase limit of swatch
10702019.description: Oops, the same swatch can only be purchased once.

10702005.title: Quantity exceeds maximum purchase limit
10702005.description: Oops, this item has a purchase limit. We've updated your cart with the maximum quantity allowed and will refresh the page shortly.

10702014.title: Quantity exceeds maximum purchase limit
10702014.description: Oops, some items in your cart have a purchase limit. We've updated your cart with the maximum quantity allowed and will refresh the page shortly.

10702006.title: Quantity not meet minimum purchase requirement
10702006.description: Oops, this item requires a minimum quantity to hit checkout. We've updated your cart to the required quantity and will refresh the page shortly.

10702015.title: Quantity not meet minimum purchase requirement
10702015.description: Oops, some items require a minimum quantity to hit checkout. We've updated your cart to the required quantity and will refresh the page shortly.

10702007.title: Quantity not meet the quantity increment requirement
10702007.description: Oops, this item can only be bought in set quantities. We've updated your cart to meet the requirement and will refresh the page shortly.

10702016.title: Quantity not meet the quantity increment requirement
10702016.description: Oops, some items can only be bought in set quantities. We've updated your cart to meet the requirement and will refresh the page shortly.

10702008.title: Item is out of stock
10702008.description: Oops, this item is out of stock for your selected shipping region. Please remove it to continue with checkout.

10702017.title: Item is out of stock
10702017.description: Oops, some items are out of stock for your selected shipping region. Please remove it to continue with checkout.

10701019.title: Applied coupon is not available
10701019.description: Sorry, the coupon code is no longer available. The page will refresh shortly.

10701022.title: Gift unavailable
10701022.description: The gift you selected is currently unavailable. Please choose another gift.

10702025.title: Applied coupon is not available
10702025.description: Sorry, the coupon code is no longer available.

10702027.title: Don’t miss your free gift!
10702027.description: Are you sure you want to checkout without claiming your free gift?

10702028.title: Gift unavailable
10702028.description: The gift you selected is currently unavailable. Please choose another gift.

10702041.title: Token expired
10702041.description: Your checkout session has expired. Please refresh the page to get the latest estimated delivery time.

10702035.title: Token expired
10702035.description: TYour checkout session has expired. Please refresh the page to get the latest estimated delivery time.

10702038.title: Selected address is deleted
10702038.description: Oops, your selected address was removed. Please choose a new one.

10702036.title: Selected address is not supported for delivery
10702036.description: Oops, looks like we do not ship to your area. We'll email you as soon as we're able to deliver to your area.

10703021.title: Promotion is changed
10703021.description: We've updated the promotion applied to your order. The page will refresh shortly.

paymentProcessingError.title: Oops, looks like your payment didn't go through.
paymentProcessingError.orderAlreadyPaid: This order has already been paid. Please view your order details or contact support if you need assistance.
paymentProcessingError.paymentPending: Your payment didn't go through. You can retry the payment from your <1>order history</1> or contact your bank.
paymentProcessingError.canceledOrExpired: Oops, looks like your payment session has expired or been canceled. You can retry the payment from your <1>order history</1>.
paymentProcessingError.clientError: Something went wrong processing your checkout. You can retry the payment from your <1>order history</1>.
paymentProcessingError.serverError: Oops, something's not working on our end. You can retry the payment from your <1>order history</1>.
paymentProcessingError.integrationError: Something went wrong processing your checkout. You can retry the payment from your <1>order history</1> or contact support if problem persists.
paymentProcessingError.threedsAuthError: Oops, 3D Secure authentication failed. Please try again. If the popup does not appear, disable any browser extensions or use incognito mode.
paymentProcessingError.authorizationError: It looks like the system couldn't authorize your payment. You can retry the payment from your <1>order history</1>, or contact support if you need help.
paymentProcessingError.accountSetupError: It looks like there's an issue with your account setup. Please verify your account information and country settings. You can retry the payment from your <1>order history</1>.
paymentProcessingError.cardDeclinedError: Oops, your payment didn't go through. Please check your card details or retry the payment from your <1>order history</1> with a different payment method.
paymentProcessingError.invalidDetailsError: Oops, not all the details seem to be filled in. Please check your info and retry the payment from your <1>order history</1>.
paymentProcessingError.amountMismatchError: The transaction amount or verification details isn't quite right. Please check the numbers and retry the payment from your <1>order history</1>.
paymentProcessingError.securityError: This action isn't available because of security or compliance rules. Contact support for assistance or retry the payment from your <1>order history</1>.
paymentProcessingError.bankAccountError: It looks like there's an issue with your bank account. Please check your details or try a different account. You can retry the payment from your <1>order history</1>.
paymentProcessingError.chargeError: It looks like the payment didn't go through due to an issue with the charge or transaction. Please check the payment status or retry the payment from your <1>order history</1>.
paymentProcessingError.genericPaymentError: Oops, your payment didn't go through. Please retry the payment from your <1>order history</1>.
paymentProcessingError.paymentProcessingError: Oops, your payment didn't go through. Please retry the payment from your <1>order history</1>.
paymentProcessingError.paypalError: {{shortMessage}} You can make the payment again from the <1>order history</1>.
paymentProcessingError.invoiceError: It looks like we couldn't process your subscription or invoice. Please check your details or contact support. You can retry the payment from your <1>order history</1>.
paymentProcessingError.regionOrCurrencyError: Oops, this service isn't supported in your region or currency. Please update your settings and retry the payment from your <1>order history</1>.
paymentProcessingError.unsupportedMethodError: Oops, this payment method is no longer supported. You can retry the payment from your <1>order history</1>.
paymentProcessingError.billingAddressError: Oops, your tax or address details isn't quite right. Please update your billing information and place your order again.
paymentProcessingError.balanceError: Oops, there may not be enough available balance to complete this payment. Please check your account or try another payment method from your <1>order history</1>.
paymentProcessingError.promotionError: Oops, the promotion or coupon code is no longer available. Please review your order and retry the payment from your <1>order history</1>.
paymentProcessingError.tokenSessionError: Oops, your payment session is no longer valid. Please retry the payment from your <1>order history</1>.
paymentProcessingError.duplicateError: Oops, this payment request may have already been submitted. Please check your order status from <1>order history</1>.
paymentProcessingError.refundStatusError: Your payment has already been processed or refunded. Please check your <1>order history</1> or contact support for help.
paymentProcessingError.transactionNotFoundError: Oops, we couldn't find this transaction. Please check your <1>order history</1> or contact support if you need help.
paymentProcessingError.paymentSuccessOrderCanceled: Oops, your order was canceled during the payment process. Please <1>contact us</1> for refund.
